name: web3-multi-provider
postCreateCommand: curl -sSL https://install.python-poetry.org/ | python - && echo 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"' >> ~/.bashrc && echo 'export GPG_TTY=$(tty)' >> ~/.bashrc && export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && poetry install && poetry run pre-commit install && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code@2.1.89
